### Reddit Subreddit

Enabled: true

Title: Debugging Race Conditions in CodeGrind’s Onboarding Flow

We tracked a race condition in CodeGrind’s onboarding sequence that caused intro state misalignment before the tower defense demo boots. The fix uses explicit dependency ordering across auth, profile fetch, asset preloading, and demo init. More details: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/05/25/debugging-race-conditions-codegrind-onboarding/

Title: Debugging Race Conditions in CodeGrind Onboarding
